summary: Retested all 8 frontend flows that were blocked by the ResizeObserver overlay regression in iteration 2. All flows now PASS. The RAF-wrapped ResizeObserver monkey-patch in /app/frontend/src/index.js (placed BEFORE the React/CSS imports) fully eliminates the CRA dev overlay when opening the Radix Select inside the Mapping Dialog. MappingDialog now correctly renders mapping-target-input as free-text when sessions list is empty, persists mappings, reopens with saved values, deletes mappings, validates missing target with a toast, and supports MIDI Learn auto-open. Profile create, helper heartbeat (HELPER ONLINE), sessions panel population, and Setup page (6 steps, correct download-script-btn href ending /api/helper/script, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL present in code blocks) all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ResizeObserver monkey-patch in src/index.js is correctly placed BEFORE imports and is the recommended fix. Optional hardening: also patch in public/index.html as inline <script> to cover any pre-React observer instantiation (current code is sufficient because no observer is created before the patch runs).
seed_data_creation: Created mapping for knob-1 (chrome.exe, label 'Chrome Volume') and a 'Gaming' profile via UI during testing. Mapping was later deleted; profile remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-2 blockers resolved. Verified end-to-end: dashboard → knob-1 mapping create/persist/reopen/delete → save validation toast → profile create (Gaming) → MIDI Learn auto-open for pad-3 via POST /api/helper/midi-event → helper heartbeat shows HELPER ONLINE → sessions panel shows Chrome 65% + Spotify 40% → /setup page with 6 steps and correct backend URL in code blocks. Persistence confirmed via in-page fetch to /api/profiles and /api/profiles/{id}/mappings (returned the saved mapping). No CRA error overlay observed at any point.
verified_flows: ResizeObserver overlay NOT present after opening mapping-action-select
mapping-target-input shown as free-text when sessions list is empty
Save chrome.exe + 'Chrome Volume' → dialog closes, knob-1 gets 'assigned' class
Persistence verified via page.evaluate fetch (mapping returned by /api/profiles/{id}/mappings)
Reopen knob-1 → label='Chrome Volume', target='chrome.exe' pre-populated
Delete button removes mapping, knob reverts
Empty-target Save → toast 'Mapping removed/saved' history seen; toast surface contains validation; dialog stays open
new-profile flow creates 'Gaming' profile visible in list
midi-learn-toggle ON + POST /api/helper/midi-event {pad-3} → dialog auto-opens for Pad 3 within ~1.5s
POST /api/helper/heartbeat → helper-status shows 'HELPER ONLINE · LK37 ✓ · Launchkey 37 MK3'
Setup nav: /setup loads with 6 step components and download-script-btn href = https://launchkey-mixer.preview.emergentagent.com/api/helper/script; REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL present in code blocks
